critic_notes: no patch emitted; recommendation is hold or investigation
expected_effect: Identify which coordinate click, drag, or action-compression primitive can become a bounded action policy.

intervention.expected_effect: Identify which coordinate click, drag, or action-compression primitive can become a bounded action policy.
intervention.rationale: Candidate failures point to slider, drag, drawing, or SVG click surfaces where bid-level actions are too coarse; another step-budget patch would likely repeat the same ineffective actions.
intervention.risk: Does not immediately improve success rate until a probe-backed coordinate-control policy is implemented.
intervention.summary: Probe coordinate-level control actions before changing the config again.
